question: For transformer T-014, inspect the last 24 hours of available voltage telemetry and report whether either voltage signal deviated more than 3% from its recent mean.
answer: It seems that there are no readings for transformer T-014 and sensor wavoltage_mV. In this case, we can't detect anomalies for that sensor. If we had readings for that sensor, the function would return a dictionary with information about the anomalies detected in the readings.

scenario.text: For transformer T-014, inspect the last 24 hours of available voltage telemetry and report whether either voltage signal deviated more than 3% from its recent mean.
